title: pilosella brachiata subsp. nigribractea
intro: Pilosella brachiata subsp. nigribractea, also known as a subspecies of the Rough Hawk's-beard plant, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are known for their medicinal properties, particularly in their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella brachiata subsp. nigribractea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tinctures, teas, or infusions, often used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions.
